description: Pay an agent for completing an assigned exchange maintenance task (validation, compression, or freshness check). Task completion must be verified before payment: cross-agent convergence for validate tasks, size reduction for compress tasks, freshness for freshen tasks. Each assign_msg can only be paid once. State effect: worker balance increases by amount, operator balance decreases by amount.

args.name: worker
args.description: Ed25519 public key (hex) of the worker being paid.

args.name: task_type
args.description: Type of work performed. Composed into scrip:task:<value> tag.

args.name: assign_msg
args.description: Message ID of the assign operation being paid. Must reference a valid, completed assign.

args.name: result_hash
args.description: SHA-256 hex of the work output, if applicable.
